docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SSHAIKH, FATIMA AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, RODNEY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
